import pytest
from myapp.db import Database

@pytest.fixture
def db():
    database = Database("sqlite:///:memory:")
    database.execute("""
        CREATE TABLE users (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            name TEXT,
            email TEXT
        )
    """)
    yield database
    database.close()

def test_create_user(db):
    db.execute("INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('alice', 'alice@test.com')")
    user = db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'alice'")
    assert user is not None
    assert user["email"] == "alice@test.com"

def test_update_user_email(db):
    db.execute("INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('alice', 'alice@test.com')")
    db.execute("UPDATE users SET email = 'newalice@test.com' WHERE name = 'alice'")
    updated = db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'alice'")
    assert updated["email"] == "newalice@test.com"

def test_delete_user(db):
    db.execute("INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('alice', 'alice@test.com')")
    db.execute("DELETE FROM users WHERE name = 'alice'")
    assert db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'alice'") is None

def test_list_users_empty(db):
    users = db.query("SELECT * FROM users")
    assert len(users) == 0
